title: zerna ornans
intro: Zerna ornans, also known as lesser burnet or Zerna, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its clusters of small, pink or white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Zerna ornans include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and promote digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it has also been used in folk remedies to treat various ailments, including sore throats and skin conditions.
